betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Solar Tower Boiler§f

§aFree steam from sunlight using heliostat mirrors. Daytime only, zero fuel cost.§f

§6Crafting§f:
§b• Boiler§f: Steel Ingot ×4 + Steel Shell ×3 + Black Dye ×2
§b• Heliostat Mirror§f: Aluminium Plate ×3 + Steel Beam + Steel Ingot ×3 — craft ×(at least 13)
§b• Mirror Adjustment Tool§f: Aluminium Ingot ×2 + Iron Ingot ×2

§6Setup§f:
1. Place the §bSolar Tower Boiler§f
2. Right-click boiler with §bMirror Adjustment Tool§f to save position
3. Place Heliostat Mirrors within §e100 blocks§f, right-click each with the tool to aim
4. Supply §bwater§f via fluid pipe, extract §bsteam§f to power engines

§6Mechanics§f:
§b• Mirrors§f: 13 mirrors = 100 mB/t steam minimum. Each 12.5 mirrors = +1 mB water/t.
§b• Max steam§f: 10,000 mB/t theoretical (buffer-limited in practice)
§b• Range§f: 100 blocks, no efficiency loss. Mirrors max 45° rotation — higher boiler = more mirrors.
§b• Blocked§f: Solid blocks above mirrors stop them (transparent blocks OK).

§6Limitations§f:
§b• Daytime only§f, reduced in evening, zero at night
§b• Regular steam only§f — can't use fluid identifiers to change type
§b• Still needs§f: Steam Engine/Turbine + Steam Condenser for closed loop

§eTip§f: Place the boiler high up (y=100+) for maximum mirror coverage. Build at least 13 mirrors to get baseline production. Solar is excellent for daytime base load.
